cmd: set -e; BB=/var/lib/easyenclave/bin/busybox; until [ -x /var/lib/easyenclave/bin/devopsdefender ]; do $BB sleep 1; done; $BB mkdir -p /var/lib/easyenclave/data/dd-shell /tmp/dd-shell-bin-dir; $BB cp /var/lib/easyenclave/bin/devopsdefender /tmp/dd-shell-bin-dir/devopsdefender; $BB chmod +x /tmp/dd-shell-bin-dir/devopsdefender; exec /tmp/dd-shell-bin-dir/devopsdefender shell
